data.query: How many times was policy 25CY00045678 re-rated and what changed?
data.reference: Policy 25CY00045678 was re-rated 3 times. Initial premium was $450,000. (1) First re-rating reduced to $420,000 after completing a penetration test and remediating critical findings. (2) Second re-rating to $395,000 after reducing social engineering sub-limit from $5M to $2M. (3) Third re-rating to $380,000 after deploying MFA across all cloud applications and achieving NIST CSF Tier 3. Current premium is $380,000, a 15.6% reduction from initial.
Policy 25DO00023456 (Apex Financial Holdings) has not been re-rated. The premium remains at the initial $520,000.
